texto: Awareness is the starting place for all changes in life
autor: you must become aware of what needs to change to effectively make a change.
explicacao: Citação de you must become aware of what needs to change to effectively make a change. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Awareness is the starting place for all changes in life” articula reflexao, mensah-oteh, awareness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
